title: Home Screen - Disconnecting/Connecting one earbud at a time
scenario: Home Screen earbud images and battery indicators update correctly when disconnecting/reconnecting individual earbuds on Voyager Free 60/60+
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.

2. Ensure a true wireless earbud device (e.g., Voyager Free 60/60+ or Voyager Free 20) is paired and connected. Verify the Home screen shows both earbuds with battery indicators and the status reads "Connected".
3. Place the Left earbud back into the charging case and close the lid, or power it off via the device. Observe the Home screen.

4. Verify the Left earbud image shows as disconnected (greyed out) and its battery indicator is greyed out or removed. Verify the overall connection status still reads "Connected" (since the Right earbud is still connected).
5. Remove the Left earbud from the charging case or power it back on. Wait for it to reconnect. Observe the Home screen.
6. Verify the Left earbud image returns to normal (not greyed out) and its battery indicator is restored. Verify the overall connection status still reads "Connected".
7. Place the Right earbud back into the charging case and close the lid, or power it off via the device. Observe the Home screen.

8. Verify the Right earbud image shows as disconnected (greyed out) and its battery indicator is greyed out or removed. Verify the overall connection status still reads "Connected" (since the Left earbud is still connected).
9. Remove the Right earbud from the charging case or power it back on. Wait for it to reconnect. Observe the Home screen.
10. Verify the Right earbud image returns to normal (not greyed out) and its battery indicator is restored. Verify the overall connection status still reads "Connected".
11. Place both earbuds back into the charging case and close the lid, or power both off. Observe the Home screen.
12. Verify both earbud images show as disconnected (greyed out) and both battery indicators are greyed out or removed. Verify the overall connection status reads "Disconnected".
expected: The Home screen correctly updates in real-time: when an individual earbud is disconnected, its image and battery indicator are greyed out; when reconnected, they return to normal. The overall connection status shows "Connected" as long as at least one earbud is connected, and "Disconnected" only when both earbuds are disconnected.
